name: Electromed, Inc.
summary: Electromed, Inc. develops, manufactures, markets, and sells airway clearance therapy products, primarily the SmartVest Airway Clearance System, which uses High Frequency Chest Wall Oscillation (HFCWO) to help patients with compromised pulmonary function clear mucus and secretions. The company operates a direct-to-patient model, managing insurance claims and delivering products to patients' homes, while also selling into acute care hospital settings for post-surgical and ICU patients.

products.name: SmartVest Clearway
products.description: Next-generation HFCWO system with touchscreen interface, single-hose design, 360-degree oscillation, and Soft Start technology for airway clearance therapy.

products.name: SmartVest SQL
products.description: HFCWO airway clearance system sold into homecare and hospital markets alongside the SmartVest Clearway.

products.name: SmartVest Airway Clearance System
products.description: Programmable air pulse generator with therapy garment and connecting hose providing HFCWO therapy for patients with compromised pulmonary function.
